name: map_over_three
cpp_unit:
#include <functional>
int map_over_three(function<int(int)> f, int a, int b, int c){ return f(a)+f(b)+f(c); }

name: make_multiplier
cpp_unit:
#include <functional>
function<int(int)> make_multiplier(int k){ return [k](int x){ return x * k; }; }

name: make_linear
cpp_unit:
#include <functional>
function<int(int)> make_linear(int a, int b){ return [a,b](int x){ return a*x + b; }; }
